org.c:
<svg viewBox="0 0 720 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="max-width:680px">
<style>.ob{fill:#fff;stroke:#2f6fb2;stroke-width:2;rx:10}.ot{font:bold 15px Tahoma;fill:#1b3a5b;text-anchor:middle}.ln{stroke:#9db6cc;stroke-width:2;fill:none}</style>
<g class="hot" data-r="ceo"><rect class="ob" x="280" y="20" width="160" height="52" rx="10"/><text class="ot" x="360" y="52">الرئيس التنفيذي</text></g>
<path class="ln" d="M360 72 V110 M90 110 H630 M90 110 V140 M270 110 V140 M450 110 V140 M630 110 V140"/>
<g class="hot" data-r="pmo"><rect class="ob" x="10" y="140" width="160" height="70" rx="10"/><text class="ot" x="90" y="170">مكتب إدارة</text><text class="ot" x="90" y="192">المشاريع PMO</text></g>
<g class="hot" data-r="it"><rect class="ob" x="190" y="140" width="160" height="70" rx="10"/><text class="ot" x="270" y="170">إدارة تقنية</text><text class="ot" x="270" y="192">المعلومات</text></g>
<g class="hot" data-r="ops"><rect class="ob" x="370" y="140" width="160" height="70" rx="10"/><text class="ot" x="450" y="182">إدارة العمليات</text></g>
<g class="hot" data-r="hr"><rect class="ob" x="550" y="140" width="160" height="70" rx="10"/><text class="ot" x="630" y="182">الموارد البشرية</text></g>
<text x="360" y="265" style="font:12.5px Tahoma;fill:#7a8896" text-anchor="middle">الهيكل التنظيمي للمؤسسة — انقر على الجهة المطلوبة</text>
</svg>

scrum.c:
<svg viewBox="0 0 760 330" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="max-width:720px">
<style>.sb{fill:#fff;stroke:#2f6fb2;stroke-width:2}.st{font:bold 13.5px Tahoma;fill:#1b3a5b;text-anchor:middle}.ar{stroke:#9db6cc;stroke-width:2.5;fill:none;marker-end:url(#ah)}</style>
<defs><marker id="ah" markerWidth="9" markerHeight="9" refX="7" refY="3" orient="auto"><path d="M0,0 L7,3 L0,6 z" fill="#9db6cc"/></marker></defs>
<circle cx="380" cy="165" r="62" fill="#eef5fb" stroke="#2f6fb2" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="6 4"/>
<text class="st" x="380" y="160">السبرنت</text><text class="st" x="380" y="180">(1 – 4 أسابيع)</text>
<g class="hot" data-r="backlog"><rect class="sb" x="20" y="130" width="150" height="66" rx="12"/><text class="st" x="95" y="158">قائمة أعمال</text><text class="st" x="95" y="177">المنتج Backlog</text></g>
<g class="hot" data-r="plan"><rect class="sb" x="215" y="25" width="150" height="56" rx="12"/><text class="st" x="290" y="58">تخطيط السبرنت</text></g>
<g class="hot" data-r="daily"><rect class="sb" x="470" y="25" width="160" height="56" rx="12"/><text class="st" x="550" y="58">الاجتماع اليومي</text></g>
<g class="hot" data-r="review"><rect class="sb" x="560" y="150" width="160" height="56" rx="12"/><text class="st" x="640" y="183">مراجعة السبرنت</text></g>
<g class="hot" data-r="retro"><rect class="sb" x="380" y="248" width="190" height="60" rx="12"/><text class="st" x="475" y="273">الأثر الرجعي</text><text class="st" x="475" y="292">Retrospective</text></g>
<path class="ar" d="M170 160 H300"/><path class="ar" d="M300 81 Q330 105 355 125"/><path class="ar" d="M420 115 Q445 80 468 62"/><path class="ar" d="M600 81 Q625 110 635 148"/><path class="ar" d="M615 206 Q580 235 570 248"/><path class="ar" d="M380 278 Q250 260 200 196"/>
</svg>

burn.c:

network.c:
<svg viewBox="0 0 760 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="max-width:720px">
<style>.nb{fill:#fff;stroke:#2f6fb2;stroke-width:2}.nt{font:bold 14px Tahoma;fill:#1b3a5b;text-anchor:middle}.ft{font:12.5px Tahoma;fill:#5c6a78;text-anchor:middle}.ar{stroke:#9db6cc;stroke-width:2.5;fill:none;marker-end:url(#ah2)}.se{fill:#1b3a5b}</style>
<defs><marker id="ah2" markerWidth="9" markerHeight="9" refX="7" refY="3" orient="auto"><path d="M0,0 L7,3 L0,6 z" fill="#9db6cc"/></marker></defs>
<circle class="se" cx="60" cy="150" r="30"/><text x="60" y="156" text-anchor="middle" style="font:bold 13px Tahoma" fill="#fff">بداية</text>
<circle class="se" cx="700" cy="150" r="30"/><text x="700" y="156" text-anchor="middle" style="font:bold 13px Tahoma" fill="#fff">نهاية</text>
<g class="hot" data-r="a"><rect class="nb" x="180" y="45" width="140" height="66" rx="10"/><text class="nt" x="250" y="73">النشاط A</text><text class="ft" x="250" y="95">الفائض = يومان</text></g>
<g class="hot" data-r="c"><rect class="nb" x="440" y="45" width="140" height="66" rx="10"/><text class="nt" x="510" y="73">النشاط C</text><text class="ft" x="510" y="95">الفائض = 3 أيام</text></g>
<g class="hot" data-r="b"><rect class="nb" x="180" y="190" width="140" height="66" rx="10"/><text class="nt" x="250" y="218">النشاط B</text><text class="ft" x="250" y="240">الفائض = يوم واحد</text></g>
<g class="hot" data-r="d"><rect class="nb" x="440" y="190" width="140" height="66" rx="10"/><text class="nt" x="510" y="218">النشاط D</text><text class="ft" x="510" y="240">الفائض = صفر</text></g>
<path class="ar" d="M85 130 Q120 90 178 80"/><path class="ar" d="M85 170 Q120 210 178 222"/><path class="ar" d="M320 78 H438"/><path class="ar" d="M320 223 H438"/><path class="ar" d="M580 80 Q640 95 678 132"/><path class="ar" d="M580 222 Q640 210 678 168"/>
</svg>
